content: its the spark system lol. Technically speaking its better than hoyoverse mainstream gacha system

having 120 guarantee is way better than 160-180
As long as it's not wizardry gacha, life is good (for me)

Which doesn't carry over so u gotta spend it before it goes away
Does anyone here understand Endfield's pity system cause I'm too caveman brain
I've done 100 pulls and lost 50/50 and I'm just gonna wait till the next interesting banner

two pities, six star pity and spark pity

80 pulls is 6 star pity, guaranteeing *a* 6 star, not necessairly the rate up

120 is spark, if you never got the rate up before the 120 you will get them there

pities don’t carry over between banner so pull wisely
Guess I'll grind until I get Surtr, and skip everything until little sister Lupo or a new guy
Does the panda count? He's considered meta too
The 80 pity for 5 stars does, the guaranteed rate up pity does not
attempts to 80 pity does carry over
if u want to gamble but not actually commit to the banner -> just pull to 80

its like saying e33 has the same gameplay as wukong cuz both are open world lol

they are both vuln eater so either go with endmin or go with panda

Speaking of Endfield it's so hard for me to gauge the convo. Since I can't even play the game myself. I just see two sides. One hating still on the Gacha and another being like "yo conveyor belt sim"
Some are saying it's better others saying it's bad. Like there is no definitive answer

*building pity from 1-79(unlucky case: didnt get any 6 stars)*
+ will carry over the 79 pull count to next banner
+ reset to 0 at 80 spark (so if u want to stop you better stop at 79 so you can bring your 80 spark to next banner)
+80 spark has 50/50 chance 
pity count also reset if u get lucky and get a 6 stars early (50/50 win or lose, get reset 80 pity all the same)
*120 spark system:*
ALWAYS guarantee to get the rateup char at 120 count. If you get early before that (e.g: get rate up character at 90 count) ,this spark will be gone. That means if u hit 120 in this banner nothing happens. HOWEVER, you will always guaranteed to get the dupe at 240 (this is unchanging no matter what condition, even if you get lucky and get dupes early, this 240 spark wont go away).
so that means ALWAYS prepare 120 if you truly want that character lol
also for example: i pull to 79  (didnt get any 6 stars) and stop  before i hit 80 spark -> next banner comes -> im only 1 pull away from getting the 80 spark. But im NOT 41 pulls away from 120 spark
